extra.reason: Added Biome (@biomejs/biome 2.4.16) as lint+formatter: biome.json (space/2, single quotes, no semicolons, lineWidth 100, excludes package-lock/.beads/dist), npm scripts lint/format/check, and ran a repo-wide format sweep normalizing the prior Prettier-default reformat noise. npm run build green; npm run lint wired (reports pre-existing findings, non-blocking).
Dynamic lighting implemented: multiply-darken + stacked additive blur passes off glow32, Light toggle + Darkness slider, 'l' keybinding. Builds green.
Implemented + committed (f3e9468): multiply-darken + stacked additive blur off glow32, Light toggle + Darkness slider, l keybinding

Blur the glow in source space (200x150) at radius/scale instead of at screen resolution, then upscale bilinear with no ctx.filter. Added blurCanvas + glowPass() helper; track emissive cell count in writeImage() and skip all glow/bloom passes (and the glowData upload) when no fire/lava present. ~16x fewer pixels + 1/4 kernel per pass.

Implementation pass landed: pixel-native chrome built into src/App.tsx + src/styles.css against DESIGN.md, with src/pixel-icons.tsx (hand-pixeled SVG icons) and src/chip-styles.ts (per-material tile textures). Window frame + titlebar (wordmark + Share/Save/Load icons), textured material tiles with Silkscreen labels/kbd badges + marching active marquee, stepped meter sliders (Brush/Speed), lit toggles (Glow/Light/Temp), Darkness dims while Light off. Accent (--accent/-dk/-lt) follows selected material — verified live re-tint Sand->Lava. Google Fonts added to index.html. Mobile layout + prefers-reduced-motion handled. Pixel-native bans hold (no blur/backdrop/radius). Build green, 13 vitest tests pass, visually verified via Playwright at desktop + mobile. Direction half was already done.

Heat field rewritten: per-material CONDUCT table + harmonic-mean face flow + Newtonian cooling (COOL 0.02) + DIFFUSE 0.2->0.13 + true-ambient decay wake band. Thresholds re-derived together (emitTemp[ICE] -100, freezePoint[STEAM] 12, deterministic water->ICE freeze, relative lava crust gate LAVA_QUENCH_DELTA). All 3 heat-field tripwires green; guardrails hold.

Fire snuff redesigned as a wet-neighbor count (water/steam; ice excluded since fire melts it): coolN>=2 drowns, coolN==1 boils-but-snuffs-at-0.7, plus a rise-block when touching any coolant so a submerged body can't drill/escape upward. Fire body quenched <20f reliably (0/200); both boil guardrails hold.
Wet gunpowder (any WATER 4-neighbor) is now inert AND immobile (soggy clump) — neither detonates nor sinks while wet. Tripwire green.
Added Mat.GLASS (MAT_COUNT 20): sand melts to GLASS at heat>=meltPoint[SAND]=220 (p=0.05). CONDUCT/dissolvable/palette/chip/baseColor wired. Glass forms at the lava-sand interface; test green.
